source_text: We should carry extra water for the desert trek.
target_text: हमें रेगिस्तानी चढ़ाई के लिए अतिरिक्त पानी साथ रखना चाहिए।
context_prev: The weather forecast predicts a dry spell.
context_next: Dehydration is a serious risk there.
speaker: speaker_07
localization_notes: Trek translated to चढ़ाई, desert to रेगिस्तानी.

source_text: I am so lonely in this big city without you.
target_text: నువ్వు లేకుండా ఈ పెద్ద నగరంలో నేను చాలా ఒంటరివాడిని అయిపోయాను.
context_prev: Moving here was the biggest mistake of my career.
context_next: Every street reminds me of our home.
speaker: speaker_74

source_text: I finally got the job offer I was praying for!
target_text: आखिरकार मुझे नौकरी का वो ऑफर मिल गया जिसके लिए मैं दुआ कर रहा था!
context_prev: They said they would call by five today.
context_next: We are going to celebrate tonight, my treat!
speaker: speaker_15
localization_notes: Uses 'दुआ' (praying) which fits high emotional cinematic joy in Hindi.

source_text: What are you doing here? I thought you were in Delhi!
target_text: నువ్వు ఇక్కడ ఏం చేస్తున్నావు? నువ్వు ఢిల్లీలో ఉన్నావనుకున్నాను!
speaker: speaker_90

source_text: She reads the local newspaper every morning.
target_text: वह हर सुबह स्थानीय समाचार पत्र पढ़ती है।
context_prev: My mother keeps track of all neighbourhood news.
context_next: It is a habit she developed years ago.
speaker: speaker_06
localization_notes: स्थानीय समाचार पत्र for local newspaper.

source_text: You are going to be a mother, we are having a baby!
target_text: నువ్వు తల్లివి కాబోతున్నావు, మనకు బాబు పుట్టబోతున్నాడు!
context_prev: The report just arrived from the clinic.
context_next: This is the best day of my life!
speaker: speaker_69

source_text: If they find us here, they will kill us both.
target_text: వాళ్ళు కనుక మనల్ని ఇక్కడ కనుగొంటే, మన ఇద్దరినీ చంపేస్తారు.
context_prev: We need to stay hidden until the patrol guards pass.
speaker: speaker_87
localization_notes: Kill us both is మన ఇద్దరినీ చంపేస్తారు.

source_text: Oh my god! The box is completely empty!
target_text: దేవుడా! ఆ పెట్టె పూర్తిగా ఖాళీగా ఉంది!
context_prev: We spent months searching for this treasure box.
context_next: Someone must have stolen the diamonds before us.
speaker: speaker_91
localization_notes: Oh my god to దేవుడా, empty to ఖాళీగా.

source_text: He has a gun! Get down, hide behind the counter!
target_text: उसके पास बंदूक है! नीचे झुको, काउंटर के पीछे छिप जाओ!
context_prev: Two masked men just walked into the bank vault.
context_next: Stay quiet, don't make any noise.
speaker: speaker_35
localization_notes: High panic. Gun to बंदूक, get down to नीचे झुको.

source_text: The keys are lying on the kitchen table.
target_text: चाबियाँ रसोई की मेज पर रखी हुई हैं।
context_prev: Have you seen my car keys anywhere?
context_next: Hurry up, we are running behind schedule.
speaker: speaker_09
localization_notes: Table remains मेज. Natural word order.
